corrections.name: QCD_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the QCD part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_1
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the leading leptonic/hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets>=2): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: QCD_ff
output.description: QCD part of the fake factor

corrections.name: QCD_subleading_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the QCD_subleading part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_2
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the subleading hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets>=2): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: QCD_subleading_ff
output.description: QCD_subleading part of the fake factor

corrections.name: ttbar_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the ttbar part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_1
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the leading leptonic/hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets==2): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; (njets>=3): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  ==2, >=3

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: ttbar_ff
output.description: ttbar part of the fake factor

corrections.name: ttbar_subleading_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the ttbar_subleading part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_2
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the subleading hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets==2): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; (njets>=3): (40.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  ==2, >=3

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: ttbar_subleading_ff
output.description: ttbar_subleading part of the fake factor

corrections.name: process_fractions
corrections.description: Calculation of process contributions (process_fractions) for the fake factor calculation.

inputs.name: process
inputs.description: name of the process

inputs.name: m_vis
inputs.description: invariant mass of the visible di-tau decay products; measured between (njets<=1): (15.0, 200.0) GeV; (njets>=2): (15.0, 200.0) GeV; for higher/lower m_vis's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  <=1, >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the +/-7% variation of the process fractions.

corrections.name: process_fractions_subleading
corrections.description: Calculation of process contributions (process_fractions_subleading) for the fake factor calculation.

inputs.name: process
inputs.description: name of the process

inputs.name: m_vis
inputs.description: invariant mass of the visible di-tau decay products; measured between (njets<=1): (15.0, 200.0) GeV; (njets>=2): (15.0, 200.0) GeV; for higher/lower m_vis's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  <=1, >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the +/-7% variation of the process fractions.
